title: The Bell Behind You: A Peasant During the Black Death
description: Try to survive the Black Death as a peasant in medieval Europe.

title: Oaths and Crossroads: A Feudal Lord in the High Middle Ages
description: Navigate loyalty, faith, land, and power during the age of feudalism and crusading.

title: Paths of Power: Life in Edo Japan
description: Make choices in Edo Japan while balancing duty, status, and social order.

title: Seeds of Change: Paleolithic Choices
topic: Early Humans and the Neolithic Revolution
description: Decide how your community responds to food, migration, and the first signs of farming.
